description: The 'portfolio' header link on the homepage and blog page contains a typo ('/portfoloi') that leads to a 404 page, and the 'contact' link on the resulting 404 page also contains a typo ('/contcat').

issues.name: Typo in Portfolio link on Homepage and Blog page
issues.description: Expected: The "portfolio" link should point to "/portfolio" and route correctly to the portfolio page. Actual: The "portfolio" link in the header on the homepage and blog page points to "/portfoloi" instead of "/portfolio", leading to a 404 page.
reproductionSteps: Observe the 'portfolio' link in the header points to '/portfoloi'
Click the 'portfolio' link and observe it leads to a 404 page
issues.expectedBehavior: The "portfolio" link should point to "/portfolio" and route correctly to the portfolio page.
issues.actualBehavior: The "portfolio" link in the header on the homepage and blog page points to "/portfoloi" instead of "/portfolio", leading to a 404 page.

issues.name: Typo in Contact link on 404 page
issues.description: Expected: The "contact" link should point to "/contact" and route correctly to the contact page. Actual: On the 404 page (reached via a broken link), the "contact" link in the header points to "/contcat" instead of "/contact", leading to another 404.
reproductionSteps: Observe the 'contact' link in the header points to '/contcat'
Click the 'contact' link and observe it leads to another 404 page
issues.expectedBehavior: The "contact" link should point to "/contact" and route correctly to the contact page.
issues.actualBehavior: On the 404 page (reached via a broken link), the "contact" link in the header points to "/contcat" instead of "/contact", leading to another 404.
